name: OpenSSF Scorecard Dependency Exposure Control Extract
population_or_context: Dependency exposure control baseline for software supply-chain review.
sample_size: one official Scorecard check documentation page covering four relevant checks
methods: Extracted the Scorecard Dependency-Update-Tool, Pinned-Dependencies, SBOM, and Vulnerabilities check descriptions, risk labels, remediation notes, and documented limitations from the official OpenSSF Scorecard check documentation.

domain_fields.control_signal: Dependency update automation, pinned build and release dependencies, SBOM presence, and known vulnerability detection
domain_fields.review_boundary: Specification-level check documentation, not a repository-specific Scorecard run
domain_fields.risk_interpretation: Provides a baseline for identifying source-backed dependency exposure signals before reviewing a concrete project dependency set
domain_fields.limitations: Does not establish that a specific repository has complete dependency inventory, timely updates, or no exploitable vulnerabilities
